title: Safe branch cleanup via dynamic base branch merge check
context: In the SDC cleanup phase, task branches must be deleted locally only if they have been safely merged, without hardcoding 'main' or affecting remote repositories.
content: Resolve the base branch dynamically using task_manager.get_base_branch() and perform a local-only merge check using 'git merge-base --is-ancestor'. Safely delete the local branch with 'git branch -d' (never -D), preserving branches with unmerged commits and failing gracefully if the branch was already deleted.
anti_patterns: Do not hardcode git base branches like main or master during merge verification.
Do not use git branch -D or push deletes during cleanup to avoid accidental loss of unmerged work or modification of remote state.
